Only after the vault is         revoked or expired."}},"notice":"One vault per AI operator. Holds the user's funds and enforces the         spending mandate on-chain. The operator (AI key) can only *propose*         spends via `requestSpend`; the vault decides. Guarantees hold even         if the operator key or backend is fully compromised. Guarantees enforced here:  - G1: total settled spend can never exceed `budgetCeiling`.  - G2: funds can only flow to an approved vendor.  - G3: per-transaction cap, daily velocity, and state gates are unbypassable.  - G4: owner or guardian can revoke instantly; revoke is terminal.  - G6: every state change and every spend decision emits an params.operator_: The AI's signing key — may only call `requestSpend`.
params.owner_: The user who owns and controls the vault.
params.vendorAddTimelock_: Delay before a queued vendor can be added        (0 for testnet/local).

fund(uint256).details: Requires prior ERC-20 approval to the vault. Only callable before      activation; never after revoke.

activate().notice: Owner activates the operator (Funded → Active). Requires the         vault to fully back its budget ceiling (no fractional reserve).

executeAddVendor(address).notice: Owner finalizes a queued vendor addition after the timelock.

fund(uint256).notice: Owner deposits `paymentToken` into the vault (Created → Funded).

getPendingVendorReadyAt(address).notice: Timestamp at which a queued vendor becomes addable (0 if none).

isIntentUsed(bytes32).notice: True once the exact committed intent hash has settled. Replay         protection (check 7): a used intent can never settle again.

lowerDailyVelocityCap(uint256).notice: Owner lowers the daily velocity cap. Can only tighten.

lowerPerTransactionCap(uint256).notice: Owner lowers the per-transaction cap. Can only tighten.

pause().notice: Owner pauses spending (Active → Paused). Funds stay safe.

queueAddVendor(address).notice: Owner queues a vendor addition. Effective after the timelock.

removeVendor(address).notice: Owner removes a vendor. Instant — contracting authority is safe.

requestSpend(address,uint256,bytes32).notice: The operator proposes a payment. Soft-rejects (returns false +         emits SpendRejected) on any failed check so the caller learns         which check failed; never reverts on a policy failure.

revoke().notice: Owner or guardian permanently revokes the vault. Terminal.         Idempotent: revoking an already-revoked vault is a no-op.

unpause().notice: Owner resumes spending (Paused → Active). Does not extend the         expiry — duration still runs from the original activation.

withdrawRemaining().notice: Owner withdraws all remaining funds. Only after the vault is         revoked or expired.
